query:
SELECT ce.eventType, ce.remoteJid, ce.fromUserId, ce.createdAt, wc.status as current_wc_status, wc.assignedUserId as current_assigned
FROM conversation_events ce
LEFT JOIN wa_conversations wc ON wc.id = ce.waConversationId
WHERE ce.eventType = 'resolved'
ORDER BY ce.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;

FROM conversation_events ce
LEFT JOIN wa_conversations wc ON wc.id = ce.waConversationId
WHERE ce.eventType = 'resolved'
ORDER BY ce.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
